description:
Build an automation that runs on a schedule: 1 days 22:00:00 Etc/UTC.
Then:
- slack: adhoc http action (mnemonic=Get Users, output=[{"control_type":"text","label":"Ok","render_input":{},"pars..., path=https://slack.com/api/users.list, response_headers=[{"control_type":"text","label":"Date","render_input":"date_...).
- snowflake: sync objects to snowflake v2 (flatten_columns=true, flatten_level=1, key_columns=id, table=SLACK.USERS), using data from step 2.

Expected observable behavior on the provided fixture: 1 external write(s):
  * snowflake::sync_objects_to_snowflake_v2 -> SLACK.USERS
